description: Style NoteStylish to the T. These vintage- inspired handbags from fossil come with a stylish upper and spacious inner. Crafted from imperial leather, these handbags double up as an accessory speaking volumes about your personality.Product DetailsGreen handbag with one main zipped compartment with organizer sleeves and a zipped pocketLong adjustable and removable handles with buckles to carry style and easeKeyhole applique on the front for styleBeaded tassels with a decorative bronze key for added styleBranded bronze zippersBranding on the keyhole Material and CareLeatherWipe with a clean dry cloth to remove dustSizeHeight: 30 cmWidth: 33 cm
